summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 3-5 features: Avatar Saudi Dialect, Avatar Trial/Pricing/Customize, Image Wizard, Channel Bridge. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend routes verified working. Fixed bug where bridge/avatar modules used owner_id but existing projects use user_id.
seed_data_creation: Avatar trial started for shop-test project during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3-5 features tested and working: (1) Avatar Saudi Dialect - POST /api/avatar/chat returns Saudi dialect keywords (هلا/وش/تبي/ابشر etc), (2) Avatar Pricing - GET /api/merchant/avatar/pricing returns trial_days=14, monthly_cost=100, customize_cost=30, 6 voices, (3) Avatar Trial - POST /api/merchant/avatar/start-trial creates 14-day trial, re-running returns 400 'التجربة المجانية مستخدمة', (4) Avatar Me - GET /api/merchant/avatar/me?project_id returns config with status.active, (5) Avatar Customize - PUT /api/merchant/avatar/customize content updates are free, identity changes cost 30 pts (free during trial), (6) Avatar Hide - POST /api/merchant/avatar/hide toggles visibility, (7) Image Wizard Categories - GET /api/wizard/image/categories returns 6 categories, 2 quality_tiers, 4 aspect_options, (8) Image Wizard Flow - POST /api/wizard/image/start + /answer completes full flow to ready state with estimated_cost, (9) Bridge Projects - GET /api/bridge/projects returns owner's projects (fixed to support both owner_id and user_id), (10) Bridge History - GET /api/bridge/history returns push history with push_cost=2. Frontend routes /dashboard/avatar, /dashboard/bridge, /chat/image all load correctly with proper UI components.

features_verified.avatar_saudi_dialect: ✅ POST /api/avatar/chat returns Saudi dialect (هلا/وش/تبي/ابشر keywords found)
features_verified.avatar_pricing: ✅ GET /api/merchant/avatar/pricing returns trial_days=14, monthly_cost=100, customize_cost=30, 6 voices
features_verified.avatar_customize: ✅ PUT /api/merchant/avatar/customize - content free, identity costs 30 pts
features_verified.image_wizard_flow: ✅ Full wizard flow works: category -> questions -> aspect -> quality -> ready
features_verified.frontend_avatar_settings: ✅ /dashboard/avatar loads with trial status, form fields, voice/tone selectors
features_verified.frontend_channel_bridge: ✅ /dashboard/bridge loads with assets grid, Story/Banner push buttons

bugs_fixed.bridge_owner_id: Fixed /api/bridge/* endpoints to support both owner_id (new) and user_id (legacy) fields in website_projects collection
bugs_fixed.avatar_owner_id: Fixed /api/merchant/avatar/* endpoints to support both owner_id and user_id fields

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (Claude Sonnet for avatar chat, Gemini for image wizard via Emergent Universal Key)
